characters.description: Ichika AbaraiRaceSoulBirthdayOctober 28[1]GenderFemaleProfessional StatusAffiliationGotei 13,Soul SocietyProfessionShinigamiBase of OperationsSeireitei,Soul SocietyPersonal StatusRelativesRenji Abarai(Father)Rukia Kuchiki(Mother)Byakuya Kuchiki(Maternal Uncle-in-law)ZanpakutōShikaiUnknownBankaiNot Yet AchievedFirst AppearanceMangaChapter 686Ichika Abarai(阿散井 苺花,Abarai Ichika) is aShinigamiapprentice in theGotei 13. She is the daughter ofRukia KuchikiandRenji Abarai.[2][3] Ichika is a young girl with bright red hair inherited from her father, which is bound with a white ribbon in a high spiky ponytail at the back. Her face resembles that of her mother, most notably her large violet eyes. She wears a standard black Shinigamishihakushō.[3] Ichika is a confident child, willing to wander off without her parents' knowledge. Her mother indicated that she was prone to getting into fights. She greetsKazui Kurosakiby pointing herZanpakutōat him while introducing herself. Ichika is easily shocked when something unexpected occurs, such as when Kazui reveals himself to be a Shinigami.[3]Ichika is fond of her father, but dislikes monsters.[4]Ikkaku Madaramesuggests that Ichika is close friends with Kazui, but this is something a flustered Ichika denies.[5]She also idolizes12th DivisionCaptainMayuri Kurotsuchi.[6]Despite her usual bravado, Ichika is still a young child at heart, and was utterly terrified and trembling when confronted bySzayelaporro Granzafter theArrancarbroke out ofHell.[7] Ichika is a confident child, willing to wander off without her parents' knowledge. characters.name: Renji Abarai
characters.description: "I am really a tramp down to my bones. I hate myself. I bark at the moon, but I don't have the courage to jump and grab it." Renji Abarai201320032001RaceSoulBirthdayAugust 31[1]GenderMaleHeight188 cm (6'2")[1]Weight78 kg (172 lbs.)[1]Professional StatusAffiliationGotei 13,Soul SocietyIchigo's GroupProfessionShinigamiPositionLieutenant of the 6th DivisionPrevious Position6th Seat of the 11th DivisionDivision6th DivisionPrevious Division11th Division5th DivisionPartnerByakuya KuchikiBase of OperationsSeireitei,Soul SocietyPersonal StatusRelativesRukia Kuchiki(Wife)Ichika Abarai(Daughter)Byakuya Kuchiki(Brother-in-law)EducationShin'ō AcademyZanpakutōShikaiZabimaruBankaiSōō ZabimaruFirst AppearanceMangaVolume 6, Chapter 51AnimeEpisode 15Video GameBleach: Heat the SoulVoicesJapaneseKentarō ItōReiko Kiuchi(child)EnglishWally WingertYuri Lowenthal(child)SpanishJordi Pons (Spain)Gabriel Ortiz (Latin America)Renji Abarai(阿散井 恋次,Abarai Renji) is the lieutenant of the6th Divisionunder CaptainByakuya Kuchikiand is married toRukia Kuchiki. He formerly served as the 6th Seat of the11th DivisionunderKenpachi Zaraki. Renji's tattoos during his time in the11th Division. Renji is quite dynamic, as his personality varies from smug and cocky before a fight, to then disquieted and depressed after a major defeat, but shows himself to be an incredibly serious and determined fighter when confronted with an actual threat. Willing to fight, kill, and die for whatever he believes in, Renji is a dangerous man to those who stand in his way, especially in regards to how close he is with his fellow childhood friend, Rukia Kuchiki.Yasutora Sadocompares his fighting style to that ofIchigo Kurosaki,[9]whom he initially antagonized but got along with quite closely since Aizen's betrayal (albeit frequently argues with). Renji is determined to surpass his captain,Byakuya Kuchiki, and it's this determination that drives Renji to grow stronger (compounded by the fact that Renji still holds onto the philosophies of the 11th Division as one of its former members), where he will die trying against a threat he himself has decided to handle alone out of his own resolve. This type of resolve has also likely been fostered from the timeIkkaku Madaramewas his mentor, as the two occasionally converse with one another at times (with Renji calling Ikkaku as "Ikkaku-san"). Renji likestaiyaki(a popular fish-shaped pancake usually filled with sweet bean paste, not to be confused with its actual namesake, fried sea bream), and has a dislike for spicy food.[4]Renji also likesfutsal, and in his free time works on assembling a team from the 6th Division, with success, more or less. The current members are himself,Rikichi Yuki, and the 4th, 8th, 13th, and 20th seated officers.[5] In regards to Renji's knack for having fancy eyewear (even if it always breaks on him and costs a lot to replace each broken pair), his dream is to wear a pair of self-designed-goggles at least once.[5]

characters.name: Robert Accutrone
characters.description: "Good indeed. It is joyous seeing your morale lifted. Most certainly so. But, you lot are mistaken in regards to one thing. The boss of you lot shall be defeated by ours. Therefore, you lot aren't the only ones whose spirits are lifted when their boss fights!" Robert AccutroneRaceQuincyGenderMaleHeight176 cm[1]Professional StatusPrevious AffiliationWandenreichEpithetN[2]Previous TeamSternritterBase of OperationsSilbernPrimary SkillsSpirit WeaponReishi PistolVollständigGrimanielFirst AppearanceMangaChapter 494AnimeEpisode 369Video GameBleach: Brave SoulsVoicesJapaneseTakaya HashiEnglishNeil Kaplan Robert Accutrone(ロバート・アキュトロン,Robāto Akyutoron) is aQuincyand a member of theWandenreich'sSternritterwith thedesignationN.[2] Robert is a stoic individual, initially ignoring the words of his opponent,8th DivisionCaptainShunsui Kyōraku, and instead leaping straight into action.[4]When he speaks, he retains a rather respectful tone, even complimenting his opponent's restored morale despite his own injuries. He has displayed great confidence inYhwach's abilities, and has stated he gains encouragement from this faith.[6]However, Robert knows that Yhwach views the Sternritter as expendable, and upon realizing that the Sternritter left in theSeireiteiwere going to die for Yhwach's sake viaAuswählen, he becomes hysterical and ranting.[7]

characters.name: Aida
characters.description: AidaRaceSoulGenderMaleProfessional StatusAffiliationGotei 13,Soul SocietyProfessionShinigamiPositionMember of the 3rd DivisionDivision3rd DivisionBase of OperationsSeireitei,Soul SocietyPersonal StatusRelativesN/AEducationShin'ō AcademyZanpakutōShikaiUnknownBankaiNoneFirst AppearanceAnimeEpisode 168VoicesJapaneseKenji TakahashiEnglishPatrick Seitz Aida(会田,Aida) is aShinigamiof theThird Divisionduring the tenure ofShūsuke Amagaias the Division's captain. Aida has brown slick hair that is combed to the right. He has black colored eyes and has a long nose that is centered in the middle of his face. Initially, Aida is very broody and unlike Inose, is not very vocal about his disappointment regarding the appointment of Amagai as his new captain.[1]Later, with the influence of the new officers he becomes more outspoken and critical, easily giving even his Lieutenant constructive criticism. He also becomes more optimistic due to their teamwork being improved and not afraid to give his opinion on the subject out loud.[2]Eager to prove his worth, he allows his determination to cloud his judgement and disobey direct orders from a superior officer to battle Menos as he is tired of his division being treated badly.[3]

characters.name: Love Aikawa
characters.description: "Once a guy's comrade falls, the battle gets personal." Love Aikawa20032001RaceSoulBirthdayOctober 10[1]GenderMaleHeight189 cm (6'2½")[1]Weight86 kg (189 lbs.)[1]Professional StatusAffiliationVisoredPrevious AffiliationGotei 13,Soul SocietyProfessionShinigami(Visored)Previous PositionCaptain of the 7th DivisionPrevious Division7th DivisionPrevious PartnerRōjūrō ŌtoribashiJinemon KotsubakiBase of OperationsVisored Warehouse,Karakura TownPersonal StatusRelativesN/AEducationShin'ō AcademyZanpakutōShikaiTengumaruBankaiUnknownFirst AppearanceMangaVolume 24, Chapter 214AnimeEpisode 122Video GameBleach: Soul Carnival 2VoicesJapaneseTetsu InadaEnglishTravis Willingham(Episode 122-366)Bill Butts(Episode 380+) Rabu Aikawa(愛川 羅武,Aikawa Rabu), more commonly referred to asLove(ラヴ,Ravu), is aVisoredand the former captain of the7th Division. His lieutenant wasJinemon Kotsubaki. Love is a laid-back and easy-going man, usually readingShōnen Jumpor some of Lisa's erotic manga in his spare time, more often than not, spoiling a piece of the story by quoting lines and explaining what the character meant by it in a dramatic, tough-guy demeanor, almost as if he was an actor rehearsing movie lines. As with most Visored, Love's attitude switches from serious to carefree within a moment's notice. During his time as a captain, Love believed in respect and maintaining the peace, quick to uphold those standards when no one else will.[2] He also appears to have little love for posturing, as indicated when he slaps the back of Rōjūrō's head, for talking about former enemies, banding together in times of war, in order to fight a common foe, just before they're about to fightCoyote Starrk. True to his more carefree side, right before starting his battle against Starrk, Love makes a manga reference in response to Starrk questioning what happened when Loves' mask dissipated.[3]Despite his comparatively friendly attitude, Love is a rather brutal and merciless fighter, not letting his opponents make a move against him and using his Shikai's special ability mixed with his mask right at the start of his battle with Starrk.[4]

characters.personality_section: Love is a laid-back and easy-going man, usually readingShōnen Jumpor some of Lisa's erotic manga in his spare time, more often than not, spoiling a piece of the story by quoting lines and explaining what the character meant by it in a dramatic, tough-guy demeanor, almost as if he was an actor rehearsing movie lines. As with most Visored, Love's attitude switches from serious to carefree within a moment's notice. characters.name: Loly Aivirrne
characters.description: "Stop! God, I hate you... How could I not?" Loly AivirrneRaceArrancarBirthdayJanuary 27[1]GenderFemaleHeight155 cm (5'1")[1]Weight42 kg (92 lbs.)[1]Professional StatusPrevious AffiliationAizen's Arrancar ArmyPrevious OccupationArrancar #33[1]Aide to Sousuke Aizen[2]Previous TeamNúmerosPartnerMenoly MalliaBase of OperationsLas Noches,Hueco MundoZanpakutōResurrecciónEscolopendraFirst AppearanceMangaVolume 28, Chapter 249AnimeEpisode 150VoicesJapaneseHana TakedaEnglishColleen O'Shaughnessey Loly Aivirrne(ロリ·アイヴァーン,Rori Aivān) is the 33rdArrancar[1]inSousuke Aizen's army. She andMenoly Malliaserved as Aizen's aides. Loly is infatuated with and protective ofSousuke Aizen, her leader, to the point at which she is willing to briefly speak out against an order before remembering her place. Aizen's interest inOrihime Inoueconfuses her and she becomes envious of the special treatment that has been reserved for her.[4]She is vindictive and cruel to those she holds a grudge against, such as when she enters Orihime's room, withMenoly Mallia, while she is alone and in distress afterUlquiorra CiferdefeatsIchigo Kurosaki.[5]She physically and verbally assaults Orihime, even after Orihime usesSōten Kisshunto heal the leg she lost toGrimmjow Jaegerjaquez, highlighting her ungratefulness. Loly is quickly angered and is brutal in her wrath. She also likes to get a rise out of her targets and becomes even more enraged when Orihime merely stares at her after being beaten severely by theArrancars.[6] Loly is very impulsive in nature as she has yelled at or challenged evenEspada-level Arrancar in her rage which usually results in her being beaten badly by her more powerful adversaries.[7]She is also quick to judge and fear things she does not understand, such as her hatred for Orihime intensifying when she sees how powerful theHumangirl is and she begins to refer to her as a "monster" due to fearing her power after witnessing her heal Menoly.[8]Menoly is Loly's closest friend, but she is not above pressuring her into attacking others or physically attacking Menoly when she disagrees with her plans.[9] Later, upon being attacked by Yammy and interrupting her own attack on Orihime, Loly displayed her more honorable side. As shown, while still enraged at Orihime, Loly still went out of her way to protect her from Yammy, indicating that while terrified at Orihime’s powers and finding her kindness incomprehensible, Loly still felt some level of gratefulness for her healing her and saving her life and felt obligated to protect her.[10]

I shall stand upon the heavens." Sousuke AizenMukenPost-DefectionPre-DefectionRaceSoulBirthdayMay 29[1]GenderMaleHeight186 cm (6'1")[1]Weight74 kg (163 lbs)[1]Professional StatusAffiliationHimselfPrevious AffiliationGotei 13,Soul SocietyArrancarArmyProfessionShinigamiPositionNonePrevious PositionLeader of the Arrancar ArmyCaptain of the 5th DivisionLieutenant of the 5th DivisionInstructor at theShin'ō Academy[2]Previous Division5th DivisionPrevious PartnerGin IchimaruKaname TōsenShinji HirakoMomo HinamoriBase of OperationsMuken,Soul SocietyPersonal StatusEducationN/AZanpakutōShikaiKyōka SuigetsuBankaiUnknownFirst AppearanceMangaVolume 9, Chapter 79AnimeEpisode 23Video GameBleach GC: TasogareVoicesJapaneseShō HayamiEnglishKyle HebertSpanishRaúl Llorens (Spain)Ricardo Mendoza(Latin)Sousuke Aizen(藍染 惣右介,Aizen Sousuke)[note 1]is the former captain of the5th Divisionof theGotei 13, whose lieutenant wasMomo Hinamori; before his captaincy, Aizen served as the division's lieutenant underShinji Hirako. For over a century, Aizen masqueraded as a benevolentShinigamiofficer while secretly plotting his betrayal and conducting depraved experiments, which around100 years agoled to theHollowficationof theVisoredand their (alongsideKisuke Urahara's) forced exile. Aizen's plans reach a tipping point after he slaughters theCentral 46, orchestratesRukia Kuchiki'sexecution, andfakeshis own death in a successful ploy to obtain Urahara'sHōgyoku. After retrieving said artifact andrevealinghis treachery, Aizen and his longtime followers,Gin IchimaruandKaname Tōsen, retreat fromSoul SocietyintoHueco Mundo, where Aizen is revealed to have built an army ofArrancar. Originally, Aizen presented himself as a kind, caring, friendly, and politecaptainof theGotei 13; his humble exterior was reflected in his use of the self-referring pronoun"boku"(僕), while using"kimi"(君) to refer to others. He shows concern for others' well-being, such as when he expresses confusion over why theCentral 46would sentenceRukia Kuchikito execution via theSōkyokufor merely overstaying in theHuman Worldand giving her powers toIchigo Kurosaki,[13]or when he orders his lieutenant,Momo Hinamori, to ensure the safety of the citizens ofSeireiteiwhen theKakaku Taihōcannonball is about to collide with theShakonmaku.[14]He is quite generous, offering Momo to let her spend the night in his office when she has trouble sleeping;[15]his charisma in particular has earned him Momo's admiration, who expresses gratitude for being able to be his lieutenant,[16]to the point where she is brought to tears when she discovers what appears to be Aizen's corpse hanging on a wall.[17]Additionally, he appears to be respectful toward his fellow captains and lieutenants, such as when he acknowledgesRenji Abaraias a skilled warrior who does not deserve to be discharged despiteBy

characters.name: Akon
characters.description: AkonPresentYouthRaceSoulBirthdayJune 29[3]GenderMaleHeight176 cm[3]Professional StatusAffiliationSoul Society,Gotei 13,S.R.D.I.ProfessionShinigamiPositionLieutenant of the12th DivisionVice-President of theS.R.D.I.[1]Previous Position3rd Seat of12th Division[2]Division12th Division,S.R.D.I.PartnerMayuri KurotsuchiRin TsubokuraHiyosuBase of OperationsS.R.D.I.,Seireitei,Soul SocietyPersonal StatusRelativesN/AEducationN/AZanpakutōShikaiUnknownBankaiNot Yet AchievedFirst AppearanceMangaVolume 8, Chapter 69AnimeEpisode 43VoicesJapaneseKeijin OkudaKaya Miyake (Child)EnglishTravis Willingham(Episode 43-321)Gavin Harrison(Episode 367+)David Lodge(Memories of Nobody)Karen Strassman(Child)Akon(阿近,Akon) is the Lieutenant and former 3rd Seat of the12th Division, and Vice-President of theShinigami Research and Development Institute. Akon is a tall man with short, spiky black hair, flared out on the sides, which has a distinguished hairline running through it. He has three small horns protruding from his forehead, and a lack of eyebrows. He wears a laboratory coat over the standard Shinigamishihakushō. 110 years ago, a much younger Akon had the appearance of a child, and did not have the three horns on his forehead, or a hairline. 17 months after the defeat of Aizen, his hair grew past his ears, and was less flared out, pointing downwards.[4][5] Akon is generally a calm and collected man even in the most strenuous of situations. However, according to Hiyosu, Mayuri and Urahara are the only two people who can make him lose his cool.[7]Additionally, he will direct the SRDI without his captain's authorization if necessary.[8]He is also typically one of the few people that gets along with Mayuri due to his scientific mind and competence, even being thanked on several occasions by his Captain. He was also friendly to Nemu, warmly referring to her as Mayuri's greatest masterpiece with a smile.[9]

He has black spiked up hair, teal eyes, and his outfit consists of the standard Arrancar blouse and hisHollowmask remnant is a skull with a bull-like horn that covers the upper-left quarter of his face. Aldegor is bullish and arrogant, though not sadistic like his partner Menis. He hates to drag fights out and therefore released so he could kill the Shinigami quickly.

characters.name: Shūsuke Amagai
characters.description: Shūsuke AmagaiRaceSoulGenderMaleProfessional StatusPrevious AffiliationSoul Society,Kasumiōji ClanGotei 13ProfessionShinigamiPrevious PositionCaptain of the 3rd DivisionPatrol Group LeaderPrevious Division3rd DivisionOnmitsukidōPrevious PartnerIzuru Kira,Makoto KibuneBase of OperationsNonePersonal StatusRelativesShin'etsu Kisaragi(Father, deceased)EducationShin'ō AcademyZanpakutōShikaiRaikaBankaiRaika Gōen KakuFirst AppearanceAnimeEpisode 168Video GameBleach: Versus CrusadeVoicesJapaneseKen'yū HoriuchiEnglishRick Zieff Shūsuke Amagai(天貝 繍助,Amagai Shūsuke) was a captain of the3rd Division, succeedingGin Ichimaru.[1]He is responsible for orchestrating the events of theKasumiōji Conspiracy.[2] Shūsuke Amagai has a rather unkempt appearance, due to his messy hair and chin stubble. He is a tall, muscularShinigamiwho has chin-length blueish hair that he wears in a somewhat ragged fashion. As opposed tohis predecessor, he wears a long-sleeved captain's haori. Aside from the extra sword sheath and the white cloth that he keeps in the fold of his uniform, his outfit is a standard Shinigamishihakushō.[1] While under the guise of being an ally, Amagai is a rather friendly and easy-going individual.  While he seems rather loyal and law-abiding, he is willing to bend or break the law if it means helping someone find the truth.[3]Decisive, charismatic, and ethical, he quickly proves to be a capable leader and earns the respect of his subordinates, most notably LieutenantIzuru Kira, who initially felt distrustful towards Shūsuke.[4] Amagai has a very low alcohol tolerance, collapsing even after eating sake-flavored pickles and acting irrational after smelling the scent of sake in the air.[3]Although he is initially looked down upon by his fellow division members, Amagai's methods and ethics eventually earned their respect. Amagai also favors teamwork and coordination between individual fighters. He used these methods in the Patrol Corps and teaches them when training his squad.[4] Amagai's true nature is more deceptive and ruthless. He manipulated all the events that transpired behind the entire Kasumiōji ordeal with an almost callous disregard for the lives of the people involved. He displays a determined, almost stubborn, desire to kill Captain-CommanderGenryūsai Shigekuni Yamamotofor murderinghis father, andRurichiyo Kasumiōjifor being born into the clan responsible for the development of theBakkōtō. He also has a habit of taunting his enemies, even when he was not fighting. He displays a somewhat arrogant demeanor, believing himself invincible with both hisBankaiand Bakkōtō in hand. Though ruthless, he is willing to spare those he doesn't deem responsible for his father's death. He tellsIchigo Kurosakithat he would have left him alive if he hadn't gotten involved in his conflict with Yamamoto. He even states that Ichigo, aHuman, didn't need to lose his life over a matter in Soul Society.[5]

characters.name: Sayori Amagake
characters.description: Sayori AmagakeRaceSoulGenderFemaleProfessional StatusAffiliationSoul SocietyBase of OperationsRukongai,Soul SocietyFirst AppearanceAnimeEpisode 173VoicesJapaneseHiromi TsunakakeEnglishDina ShermanSayori Amagake(天駆細依,Amagake Sayori), sometimes referred to asSacchi, is a princess who hails from an unnamed noble family and is friends withRurichiyo Kasumiōji. Sayori is a young girl, approximately the same size asRurichiyo, with long brown hair and blue eyes. She has a short fringe on above her forehead and she has her long hair tied together in intricate patterns; sitting atop her head is a small lavender headband with a golden ribbon-like ornament. She wears a long, decorated indigo kimono.[1] Sayori displays a personality typical of most nobles when around servants. However, she immediately drops this when she's alone around her friends, becoming much more cheerful and friendly.[1] Sayori displays a personality typical of most nobles when around servants. characters.name: Nayura Amakado
characters.description: Nayura AmakadoRaceSoulGenderFemaleProfessional StatusAffiliationSoul SocietyOccupationCentral 46MemberPrevious OccupationDaireishokairōLibrarianBase of OperationsSeireitei,Soul SocietyPersonal StatusRelativesUnnamed father (deceased)First AppearanceNovelBeginning of the Revive of TomorrowNayura Amakado(阿万門 ナユラ,Amakado Nayura) is a member of theCentral 46, specifically one of its 40 sages. Originally the Chief Librarian of theDaireishokairō, she inherited her position among the Central 46 after her father, a previous member, was murdered bySousuke Aizen.[1] Nayura is a small girl with small thick eyebrows who looks to be around 10 years of age, as opposed to her true age. Like all Central 46 members, she wears white haori and blackshihakushōunderneath. At first, Nayura believed that Central 46 is absolute and everything decided by Central 46 is what the best forSoul Society. However, after meetingIzuru Kira, Nayura began to reconsider the current condition of Central 46. Unlike most nobles in general, Nayura has broad way of thinking, wishing to understand more aboutShinigamiand citizens of Soul Society through her own experience as she believes that understanding them would improve how Central 46 should act. Her willingness made her not seeing any problem interacting with those of lower status and even at some point directly went toRukongaiherself. This allowed her to see how arrogant and short-minded Central 46 is and determined to change it. Her shrewdness which has existed long beyond what meets the eye, is acknowledged by bothShunsuiandNanao. She is also brave, refusing to disclose the key to the Daireishokairō even when her own life is threatened. characters.name: Luppi Antenor
characters.description: "How unfortunate for you, captain. You don't get to kill me. Don't forget my face because the next time we meet, I'll twist off that tiny head of yours and crush it!" Luppi Antenor20032001RaceArrancarBirthdayJune 5[1]GenderMaleHeight161 cm (5'3½")[1]Weight45 kg (99 lbs.)[1]Professional StatusAffiliationTwelfth DivisionPrevious AffiliationAizen's Arrancar ArmyOccupationTest SubjectPrevious Occupation6th EspadaTeamCorpse UnitPrevious TeamEspadaPartnerDordoni Alessandro Del SocaccioCirucci SanderwicciCharlotte ChuhlhourneBase of OperationsSeireitei,Soul SocietyZanpakutōResurrecciónTrepadoraFirst AppearanceMangaVolume 26, Chapter 229AnimeEpisode 138Video GameBleach: Heat the Soul 4VoicesJapaneseDaisuke KishioEnglishMichael SinterniklaasLuppi Antenor(ルピ・アンテノール,Rupi Antenōru) was theSexta(6th)EspadainSousuke Aizen's army,[2]having temporarily replacedGrimmjow Jaegerjaquezbefore his death at the latter's hands.[3]He was later resurrected byMayuri Kurotsuchiand became a member of theTwelfth Division'sCorpse Unit.[4] Luppi showing off his tattoo. Luppi is rather arrogant, insulting Grimmjow for his lowered rank and boasting constantly when in battle. He mocks his enemies by saying "Sorry!" in a sarcastic tone after insulting somebody, as well as by licking his lips and noting the odds against his enemies out loud (e.g. 4-on-8).[8][9] In battle, Luppi is unsatisfied with fighting opponents that pose no challenges to him, going so far as to invite multiple opponents to attack him simultaneously during his battle inKarakura Town. Luppi also likes toying with his opponents in battle, especially if he doesn't consider them a threat. He is easily irritated, however, rising to the simplest of taunts. He is a bit lewd, commenting on Rangiku's breasts, but almost immediately afterwards, he threatened to kill her. He is clearly vengeful, as when the mission was over and he was still alive afterTōshirō Hitsugaya's attack, he vowed to the young captain that he'd be back to kill him.[10] Luppi andGin Ichimaru, on the other hand, are on good terms, as Gin comments about being lonely after Luppi's death, citing the fact that the two often spoke.[11]Though in an omake, after Gin makes a friendly comment on it, Luppi gleefully denies this fact, much to Ichimaru's dismay.[12]

BlancAoga(青鹿,Aoga) is aShinigamiof the4th Divisionof theGotei 13,[1]having survived horrific injuries during aHollowattack when he was a 6th year student at theShin'ō Academy.[2] Aoga is a tall man with short black hair and a long thin face with small eyes. He wears the standard Shin'ō Academy male uniform and he has hisZanpakutōon a strap across his back. After surviving the Hollow attack on the ill-fated training exercise he led, Aoga gained a large scar on the left side of his chin that extends up to his neck.[1] Upon becoming a member of the 4th Division, he wears the standardshihakushōwith the medical backpack for said division.[1]

Emilou Apacci20032001HollowRaceArrancar(Adjuchas)BirthdayMay 17[1]GenderFemaleHeight156 cm (5'1½")[1]Weight42 kg (92 lbs.)[1]Professional StatusAffiliationTier HarribelPrevious AffiliationSousuke Aizen's Arrancar ArmyPrevious OccupationHarribel's FracciónArrancar #54[1]TeamTres BestiasPrevious TeamNúmerosPartnerFranceska Mila RoseCyan Sung-SunBase of OperationsLas Noches,Hueco MundoZanpakutōResurrecciónCiervaFirst AppearanceMangaVolume 30, Chapter 269AnimeEpisode 161Video GameBleach: Soul Carnival 2VoicesJapaneseKumi SakumaEnglishMegan Hollingshead Emilou Apacci(エミルー・アパッチ,Emirū Apacchi) is the 54th[1]ArrancarinSousuke Aizen's army and one ofTier Harribel's threeFracción, collectively known as theTres Bestias.[2] Apacci is impatient,[5]short-tempered,[6]rude,[5]impulsive,[7]and confrontational,[5]and is usually scolded byCyan Sung-Sunas a result.[8]She is fiercely loyal to Harribel, finding the action of Hitsugaya raising his sword at her deeply offensive.[9]She is fairly confident inTier Harribel's abilities, and is easily assured when told Harribel cannot lose.[9] Despite her irrational behavior Apacci has enough common sense to recognize who she sees as enemies. Despite being enemies with theShinigamiin the past, she warned Substitute ShinigamiIchigo Kurosakinot to get caught in the crossfires withAyon, knowing her current enemies were theWandenreich.[10]

BlancSpanishVicente Gil (Spain)Paco Mauri (South America) Makizō Aramaki(荒巻 真木造,Aramaki Makizō), nicknamedMaki-Maki, is aShinigamiand a member of the11th Division.[2] Aramaki is a somewhat tall man with a middle-aged appearance, black eyes sporting small pupils, dark brown neck-length hair that he keeps swept back, and whiskers around his mouth. He stays dressed in hisShihakushōand carries his Zanpakutō on his left hip. He is often very timid and cowardly, in contrast to other members of the 11th division, and is unable to understand whyIchigoand his friends would risk their lives forRukia Kuchiki. He is very annoyed by the nickname thatYachiru Kusajishigave him, and is also frightened of her, despite serving her for almost ten years.[3]

characters.name: Tatsuki Arisawa
characters.description: "I've seen you through so many hard times! I've helped you so many times! You don't...You don't hide things from someone like that." Tatsuki Arisawa201320032001RaceHumanBirthdayJuly 17[1][2]Age15 (Chapters 2-33; 2001)16 (Chapters 35-417; 2001)17 (2003)27 (Epilogue)GenderFemaleHeight155 cm (5'1")[3]Weight41 kg (90 lbs.)[3]Blood TypeA[2]Professional StatusAffiliationKarakura TownOccupationHigh School Student, Dojo Assistant Instructor[4]Base of OperationsKarakura Town, Japan,Human WorldPersonal StatusRelativesUnnamed MotherEducationKarakura High SchoolFirst AppearanceMangaVolume 1, Chapter 2AnimeEpisode 2Video GameBleach: The Blade of FateVoicesJapaneseJunko NodaEnglishWendee LeeSpanishIsabel Valls (Spain)Maggie Vera (Latin America) Tatsuki Arisawa(有沢 竜貴,Arisawa Tatsuki) is a student atKarakura High School, and is in the same class asIchigo Kurosaki, her childhood friend and formerkaratepartner. Tatsuki is a tomboy who is bold, outgoing, and extroverted. She is laid back and levelheaded most of the time, unless she is provoked by somebody. She aggressively uses her great strength to deal with anyone who troubles her or her friends. She easily hits anyone who annoys Orihime or gives her some sort of deep personal insult, seen whenKon, while inside Ichigo's body, gives her a compliment and apparently kisses her on the cheek. She stays angry for some time, even after wrecking much of the classroom and Kon flees the scene. She has a lot of insight on Ichigo's personality. When they were children, Tatsuki regularly saved Ichigo when he was getting beaten up, as well as cheering him up when he was upset. Atomboyishkarate practitioner with dreams of becoming avale tudochampion and already ranking Japan's second strongest in her age group, her only obvious feminine trait is how she writes her name usinghiragana(たつき), though this is because she thinks it looks feminine while she considers thekanjiof her name to be unappealing. Tatsuki is constantly protecting Orihime from men looking for a date, as well as the school lesbianChizuru Honshō(who often approaches and tries to grab Orihime's chest). Tatsuki has done this since middle school, when she beat up some bullies who were trying to cut Orihime's hair, and had already done so once before Orihime's brother died. After that, Tatsuki promised to protect her from anyone who dared to make her cry, and she and Orihime became best friends.

characters.description: Tatsuki ArisawaRaceHumanBirthdayJuly 17[1]Age15GenderFemaleHeight155 cm (5'1")[2]Weight41 kg (90 lbs.)[2]Blood TypeA[1]Professional StatusAffiliationKarakura TownOccupationHigh School StudentPrevious TeamKarakura-Raizer TeamBase of OperationsKarakura Town, Japan,Human WorldPersonal StatusRelativesUnnamed MotherEducationKarakura High SchoolFirst AppearanceAnimeEpisode 2VoicesJapaneseJunko NodaEnglishWendee LeeSpanishIsabel Valls (Spain)Maggie Vera (Latin America) Tatsuki Arisawa(有沢 竜貴,Arisawa Tatsuki) is a student atKarakura High School, and is in the same class asIchigo Kurosaki, her childhood friend and formerkaratepartner. Tatsuki later sees Orihime and the others after they return from Soul Society during the new school semester. Tatsuki greets all her friends as they begin class. At the end of the day, Orihime and Tatsuki share a moment while eating. When Orihime appears troubled, Tatsuki asks if something happened during her “visit to her relatives.” Orihime tells of her feelings of being “useless” and how she thought of Tatsuki supporting her during this. In response, Tatsuki tells her that being considered useful or not isn't for one’s self to decide. This cheers Orihime up.[3]

characters.description: "If it's about our faces, keep it to yourself. We got tired of hearing people's thoughts about them a very long time ago." Aaroniero ArruruerieNormalUnmaskedRaceArrancar(Gillian)BirthdayApril 23[1]GenderMaleHeight205 cm (6'8¾")[1]Weight91 kg (200 lbs.)[1]Professional StatusAffiliationAizen's Arrancar ArmyOccupation9th EspadaTeamEspadaBase of OperationsAaroniero's TowerLas Noches,Hueco MundoZanpakutōResurrecciónGlotoneríaFirst AppearanceMangaVolume 26, Chapter 229AnimeEpisode 138Video GameBleach: Heat the Soul 5VoicesJapaneseKaien Shiba:Toshihiko SekiDeep-voiced:Ryūzaburō ŌtomoHigh-voiced:Mayumi YamaguchiEnglishKaien Shiba:Dave MallowDeep-voiced:Keith SilversteinHigh-voiced:Wendee LeeSpanishKaien Shiba: Jose Gilberto VilchisDeep-voiced: Ricardo BrustHigh-voiced: Gloria Obregón (Latin America) Deep-voiced: Ricardo BrustHigh-voiced: Gloria Obregón (Latin America) Aaroniero expresses some amount of pride in his ability to "continue evolving" and his position as anEspada, despite hisGillianstatus. Somewhat cruel and sadistic, Aaroniero enjoys toying with his opponents, particularly those he has information on from his absorbed memories, askingRukia Kuchikito kill her comrades to make up forKaien Shiba's death. Interestingly, his two heads have a degree of individuality, and tend to talk in tandem when revealed, giving the effect of two people speaking in turn, since they refer to themselves in plural when exposed, and each reacted differently to the idea of death (the bottom head panicked and screamed for Aizen's aid while the top one merely cursed Rukia). Strangely, however, Aaroniero never appears to refer to to himself in plural whenever he is transformed.

characters.description: Keigo Asano201320032001RaceHumanBirthdayApril 1[1]Age15 (2001)17 (2003)27 (2013)GenderMaleHeight172 cm (5'7¾")[1]Weight58 kg (128 lbs)[1]Blood TypeAA[1]Professional StatusAffiliationKarakura TownOccupationHigh School StudentRamen shop owner[2]Previous TeamKarakura-Raizer TeamBase of OperationsAsano House,Naruki City,Human WorldPersonal StatusRelativesMrs. Asano (mother)Mr. Asano (father)Mizuho Asano(Sister)EducationKarakura High SchoolFirst AppearanceMangaVolume 1, Chapter 7AnimeEpisode 2VoicesJapaneseKatsuyuki KonishiEnglishYuri LowenthalSpanishAlbert Trifol Segarra (Spain)Benjamín Rivera(Latin America)Keigo Asano(浅野 啓吾,Asano Keigo) is a student at theKarakura High School, in the same class asIchigo Kurosaki. Twelve years after Ichigo defeatedYhwach, Keigo opened up a Ramen shop. Keigo is a teenager with medium-long brown hair, which flips outward. He has brown eyes and a slim figure. His expression usually stays the same with either frowns or pouts, but whenever a girl is involved, he smiles. At school, he wears the standard Karakura High School uniform. Outside of school, he wears casual clothes, and often wears a plain t-shirt and pants, sometimes with a jacket. 17 months later, his hair is slightly straighter, and his bangs now cover part of his forehead. 10 years after Yhwach's defeat, Keigo's hair is much shaggier.[3] Keigo is usually a goofy and extremely hyper-active boy, often using overly-dramatic movements and words to act out his feelings. He enjoys watching fireworks, playing role-playing games, and going to beach parties. Keigo is usually a goofy and extremely hyper-active boy, often using overly-dramatic movements and words to act out his feelings. He enjoys watching fireworks, playing role-playing games, and going to beach parties. A good-natured teenager, Keigo often tries (and fails) to "woo" girls and cheer up Ichigo, often ending up in Ichigo hitting him in some way. He is good friends with fellow studentMizuiro Kojima, whose calm, innocent demeanor and success with women acts as a foil to Keigo's impulsive, wannabe personality. A classmate of Ichigo's sisters,Midoriko Tōno, has a crush on him, liking how "he always has a little smile, even when he's alone."[4] Keigo appears to be a shallow teenager at first, with a passion for slacking off. Indeed, he takes great pride in not making it to the honors roster (higher than the 50th ranking), and labels those who do so "traitors" (including Ichigo, who made the 23rd rank, andYasutora Sado, who made the 11th rank). However, Mizuiro states Keigo is much smarter than his bad grades show.[5]Keigo is a quick, but arrogant, learner; he successfully blocksRangiku Matsumoto's kick after being attacked by her just once, but leaves an opening when he brags about it, which leads to him getting kicked in the face.[6]
